questions.question: In digital IC design, what does RTL primarily refer to?
When a CPU writes data to a cache, which of the following policies dictates that data is written simultaneously to both the cache and main memory?

Which advanced verification methodology focuses on creating reusable, configurable, and randomized test environments using a standard library of verification components to improve verification efficiency and coverage for complex SoCs?

Which advanced power management technique involves dynamically adjusting the operating voltage and frequency of a processor or specific IP blocks based on workload demands, aiming to optimize both power consumption and performance?

In a multi-processor system, what concept defines the rules for how memory operations (reads and writes) from different processors appear to be ordered, ensuring a consistent view of shared memory across all cores?
